programme.title: Tim Young
programme.desc: Tim headlines clubs all over North America, has performed on over 500 college campuses as well as comedy festivals in New York, Montreal, and Seattle, and he's a fixture in the New York City club scene. He was a finalist on NBCs Last Comic Standing, has appeared on Comedy Centrals Premium Blend, Tough Crowd, and Shorties, and you may have seen him as a commentator on VH1, MTV, TLC and the E! Channel.

programme.title: Matthew Jenkins: I Also Have Merch!
programme.desc: Unfortunately, racism is still alive, but Matthew Jenkins has a few ways around it: naming your kid Case Dismissed " going to the state penitentiary for a degree and reversing Simba's fatherless childhood.

programme.title: Phil Kopczynski
programme.desc: Phil Kopczynski is a reluctant nice guy and father who just wants to occasionally play in the wilderness and regularly make city-dwellers laugh.

programme.title: Karen Morgan
programme.desc: A former trial attorney, she moved from the courtroom to comedy after being selected as a Finalist on Nickelodeon TV's Search for the Funniest Mom in America.

programme.title: Chris Cope
programme.desc: Chris Cope, a Florida transplant now living in LA. The city has been good to Chris in just 4 short years he's appeared on Jimmy Kimmel Live, Tosh.O, Laughs on Fox. He's acted in feature films and also appeared on the hit ABC TV Show "Grey's Anatomy".

programme.title: Johnny Beehner
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Robert Mac
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Mike Paramore
programme.desc: Mike Paramore is the guy you fight to sit next to in a movie theatre, on a long car ride, or during a boring lecture. His natural ability to infuse everyday situations with energetic, uplifting humor, combined with a natural ability to put you at ease is key to his personal brand of comedy. His smooth delivery and? powerful punchlines make him a force in stand-up comedy, which is very apparent in his debut album "The Things We Tell Ourselves", available now on iTunes and Amazon. Mike has opened for comedians like Damon Wayans, Cash Cab's Ben Baily, Jon Lovitz, and Saturday Night Live's Jay Pharoah.

programme.title: DC Benny
programme.desc: Benny lives in Brooklyn where he fiddles around with old Land Rovers when he is supposed to be helping his wife run her natural skincare business. He has a dog named Grits and two cats who prefer that he not share their personal information in this bio.

programme.title: Michael Joiner
programme.desc: Michaelís brand of comedy is, in a word, familiar. Not in the sense that youíve heard it before, but more so that he knows you and you know him. He speaks about the things you are thinking in a way that sounds so much like your inner voice it is astounding. His effortless delivery will resonate with you. Michael is the 1st Place winner of the Hollywood Improv's "FUNNIEST COMIC IN L.A." 2008, and 2010 Christian Music Hall of Fame "COMEDIAN OF THE YEAR" nominee, Joiner has attracted wide praise for his routines that blend a sarcastic edginess with a devotion to clean humor. Joiner has headlined at The LA AREA Improvs, The Funny Bone, The Ice House and other comedy clubs across the country while also performing at colleges and sold out Clean Comedy Concerts nationwide. He's also written for "The Tonight Show With Jay Leno." He has been performing nationwide for over 25 years and is rated one of the nation's funniest Clean Stand-up Comedians. The TV Guide Network calls Michael "One of the funniest, most original, stand up Comedians working today!" In 2006, Michael was one out of only four Comedians chosen worldwide to star in the top selling DVD, "The Clean Stand Up Comedy Tour." Unlike many Comedians who stick to their rehearsed script, Michael's stand up comedy show includes some of the most clever, hilarious improv and audience interaction you will ever experience.

programme.title: Richard Sarvate

programme.desc: The ghosts of three elderly industrialists killed in an airplane crash return to Earth to help reunite a young couple whom they initially brought together on Christmas Eve. programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic treatment to this sci-fi fantasy classic. A mercenary with a three-bladed sword is recruited to help a princess foil the designs of a powerful sorcerer. Join The Mike and The Bill and The Kevin for The Sword and the Sorcerer!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a dirty dog that really doesn't want a bath. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Harry The Dirty Dog!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Fairy King of Ar is a delightful journey into a magical land that starts with Grandma dropping dead and dad contracting emphysema. And once you see the fairy “special effects”, we think you'll agree it gets even more depressing from there. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The protagonist rides around the Sunset Strip on a motorcycle, and he's trying to help a friend keep his sleazy nightclub open in the face of organized crime. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: Based on the true story of the greatest treasure hunt in history, THE MONUMENTS MEN centers around an unlikely World War II platoon, tasked with going into Germany to rescue artistic masterpieces from Nazi thieves and returning them to their rightful owners. In a seemingly impossible mission, the Monuments Men, as they were called, find themselves risking their lives in a race against time to avoid the destruction of 1,000 years of culture.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg stars as a sassy lounge singer forced to hide from the mob in the last place anyone would ever look for her - a convent. Harvey Keitel and Kathy Najimy join a heavenly cast in this habit-forming comedy bursting with '60s Motown hits.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: The eccentric dad of three children dresses as a British nanny so he can care for his children at the home of their mother in this touching comedy.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: Out-of-control comedy features Jim Carrey at his hilarious best as a hard-wired cable installer just looking for a friend. Matthew Broderick co-stars.

programme.title: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Lucy, a lonely subway worker, becomes smitten with a handsome stranger (Peter Gallagher). But when she saves his life after he's been mugged and fallen into a coma, his hilariously offbeat family mistakes her for his fiancée!

programme.title: Life-Size 2: A Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Grace Manning is in over her head as CEO of Marathon Toys and her wild-child ways are causing the company's stock to plummet. Grace's old Eve doll magically awakes to help get Grace back on track.

programme.title: Ernest Saves Christmas
programme.desc: When Santa Claus decides to retire and pass on his magic bag of Chrismas surprises to a new St. Nick, he enlists the aid of a hilarious assortment of characters, including that lovable know-it-all Ernest P. Worrell.

programme.title: Santa Baby 2: Christmas Maybe
programme.desc: Santa is in a late-life crisis – he's tired of his responsibilities and is ready to pass on the reins to Mary, his business-minded daughter, who feels torn between the family business and running her own firm in New York City. The situation intensifies when Teri, an ambitious new arrival to the North Pole, sows dissension at the workshop.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.desc: When workers in a London tunneling project awaken an unearthly fire-breathing beast from centuries of slumber, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: One Starry Christmas
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Holly can't wait to go back to New York City this Christmas.

programme.title: Royal New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Fashion designer Caitlyn meets Jeff on the day she is hired to design a gown.

programme.title: Window Wonderland
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sloan Van Doren is hoping to take over the head window designer spot.

programme.title: A Family Christmas Gift
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amber spends the holidays with her Aunt Dora and helps plan a Christmas Concert.

programme.title: The Christmas Setup
programme.desc: Kate arranges for Hugo to run into Patrick, Hugo's high school secret crush.

programme.title: A Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: Designer Priscilla & her assistant vie for the attention of Priscilla's boyfriend.

programme.title: Christmas Love Letter
programme.desc: Hess receives an unsigned love letter in a Christmas card

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Three children and their father move from California to Canada.

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As human blood becomes more scarce, vampires must search for new ways to satisfy their craving.

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: After a plane crash, a toxic virus begins to spread. A couple is quarantined but must fight for survival.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant to see again. However, she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When NY City is in trouble, it's up to the four ninja-fighting, pizza-loving brothers to save it. Aided by determined reporter April O'Neil and their wise master Splinter, these unlikely heroes must face their ultimate nemesis - the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The machine elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg into the past to kill a young boy.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five New Yorkers struggle to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Fatal Contact: Bird Flu In America
programme.desc: Scientists race against time to save the world from a mutated avian flu outbreak.

programme.title: Lake Placid Vs. Anaconda
programme.desc: The heart-pounding head to head battle between the crocodiles and anacondas begins.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young couple move into their dream home and are harassed by their next-door neighbor, an LAPD officer.

programme.title: Fireproof
programme.desc: In an attempt to save his marriage, a firefighter uses a 40-day experiment known as "The Love Dare."

programme.title: Miss Grant Takes Richmond
programme.desc: A secretary works for a rel estate developer, unaware that the business is a front for his illegal operation.

programme.title: The Trouble With Angels
programme.desc: A pair of troublemakers wreak havoc on a convent school.

programme.title: A Raisin In The Sun (1961)
programme.desc: Conflicts of a struggling African-American family who suddenly come into a financial windfall.

programme.title: How To Save A Marriage (And Ruin Your Life)
programme.desc: To save his best friend's marriage, a lawyer seduces the man's mistress, not realizing it is the wrong woman.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: Tommy's earned his diploma and a job at Callahan Auto Parts. However, the family business starts tanking and now Tommy hits the road with his dad's right-hand man, a smug numberscruncher.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Christmas Manger
programme.desc: An elderly man struggles with the death of his wife until his estranged foster child and her young daughter re-enter his life and give him a new purpose to live.

programme.title: Must Be Santa
programme.desc: An angel (Deanna Milligan) must convince a new recruit (Arnold Pinnock) that he should be Santa, to the dismay of her boss, the North Pole's CEO (Dabney Coleman).

programme.title: Aliens Stole My Body
programme.desc: Stranded on a mysterious planet, the Galactic Patrol embarks on a quest to find the only being who can stop B'KR -- the most fiendish villain in the galaxy.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: A man has to figure out a way to make extra money when his father-in-law moves in.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: A Mile In His Shoes
programme.desc: Baseball coach Murph needs a miracle to save the team. Pitcher Micky with Aspergers may be the answer.

programme.title: The Secrets of Comfort House
programme.desc: A multiple murder investigation in a small hunting town focuses on one suspect, Wendy Sinclair, who operates a battered women's shelter where each of the victims' wives have sought shelter.

programme.title: A Cape Cod Christmas
programme.desc: A children's author hosts one last Christmas dinner before selling the family home but finds a way to save the home when reuniting with a former ex.

programme.title: Chasing Christmas
programme.desc: A burned-out Ghost of Christmas Past goes AWOL, leaving his target stranded in 1965 during the holidays.

programme.title: Big Bang
programme.desc: Man-su, fired and facing divorce in one day, meets Chul-gon in jail. They escape and become wanted terrorists.

programme.title: Sunny
programme.desc: Soon-yi joins band heading to Vietnam to find her husband in the Vietnam War, singing for soldiers there.

programme.title: Life Risking Romance
programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone's scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them, using various tactics.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: After not seeing his family for over seven years, P.J. gets talked into going home for Christmas by his co-workers. Excited to see PJ, the entire family comes home for the Christmas season his family is loaded with personality and has a flair for the dramatic. He reconnects with his high school sweetheart, Rebecca, and after having a fight with his father, is reminded of the importance of love and forgiveness. Only then does his perspective change and he embraces second chances at life.

programme.title: Rain for Christmas TV-14
programme.desc: Malik decides to bring his girlfriend home to Houston for Christmas. When she meets his family, they think he is all wrong for her. He meets his grandpa's nurse, Rain, and soon realizes the true meaning of love and what he really wants for Christmas.

programme.title: Missing You This Christmas TV-14
programme.desc: Carmen's family has an annual Christmas tradition that supports her neighborhood. When her mother dies suddenly, she looses the holiday spirit, and no longer wants to continue, until she's visited by her late father's spirit who encourages her to keep hope alive.

programme.title: And They Named Her Love
programme.desc: Love, a hopeless romantic painter, sets out on a cross country journey to find herself in the competitive world of artistry. When a near death experience brings Atlanta based songstress Nasada into her life, she goes on a journey to find out that love and business do not always mix.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley, Nat Adderley, Yusuf Lateef & Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: Cannonball Adderley: Live in '63 boasts two beautifully filmed concerts from one of the most celebrated sextets in jazz history, captured at the top of their game. Cannonball Adderley (alto sax), Nat Adderley (cornet), and the masterful Yusef Lateef (tenor sax, flute, oboe), provide a massive three-horn frontline attack, while the stellar rhythm section featuring a pre-Weather Report Joe Zawinul (piano), Sam Jones (bass), and Louis Hayes (drums) fuel the songs with a deep infectious swing. Quincy Jones' "Jessica's Day" leaps from the gate with a huge big band sound that is extraordinary for only six musicians. This recording is a reminder that Cannonball Adderley was one of the most outstanding and highly respected alto saxophonists in the history of jazz. He was a bluesy jazzman who could play anything in superb fashion.

programme.title: Trummy Young
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: David Linx
programme.desc: This might come unexpected, but the Brussels Jazz Orchestra (BJO) is not the kind of jazz orchestra that sticks to standards. They prefer to achieve the highest level by composing original music, creating unique arrangements, and playing inventively as well as passionately. In fact, it really is jazz with a dynamic orchestral sound, with a classic strength in which each musician is also a brilliant soloist. Call it an ‘orchestrated passion for jazz' that incites BJO to create world-class music. Founded in 1993 by Frank Vaganée, Serge Plume and Marc Godfroid, the Brussels Jazz Orchestra is recognised and has been subsidised by the Flemish Government since. Brussels Jazz Orchestra is orchestra in residence at Flagey in Brussels. During this project the BJO performs with David Linx. The Belgian jazz singer will resort to any idiom, any language, any time signature. Occasionally he seems to dispense with bar lines altogether, or he will go beyond lyrics, as he abandons his own words for some free-wheeling scat.

programme.title: Gerry Mulligan, Dave Glenn, Harold Danko & Ed Neumeister
programme.sub-title: Gerry Mulligan Big Band - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1982, American saxophonist Gerry Mulligan gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Mulligan was one of the leading arrangers of the cool jazz era, who worked with Miles Davis, Stan Kenton and Claude Thornhill in the 1950s and 1960s. Mulligan's early pianoless 1950s quartet with trumpeter Chet Baker is still regarded as one of the finest groups in cool jazz. Born in New York in 1927, Mulligan spent his life composing, arranging and playing jazz until his death on January 20, 1996.

programme.title: Wycliffe Gordon
programme.sub-title: Wynton Marsalis: In This House, on This Morning
programme.desc: The final concert of the Münchner Klaviersommer 1992 was by Wynton Marsalis and his septet. The 31-years-young star trumpeter performed one of his own jazz suites to the sold-out Philharmonie, under the title of ‘In This House, On This Morning'. The concert covers every jazz style, in composition and improvisation, and in both small and grand forms. Marsalis's Septet was made up of Wess Anderson (alto saxophone), Wycliffe Gordon (trombone), Reginald Veal (bass), Herlin Riley (drums), Todd Williams (tenor saxophone), and Eric Reed (piano).

programme.title: Dire Straits
programme.desc: During the recording of Dire Straits' third album, Making Movies, David Knopfler suddenly left the band, bringing a permanent end to the brothers' partnership within the group. As the 80s began, the band made use of the rise of music television to promote making movies and their subsequent output. Dire Straits finally dissolved in 1995, after Mark decided he wanted to focus on his solo career with no plans to re-form the band. Featuring archive material, music videos “Brothers in Arms” “Calling Elvis” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard). Rock Legends Dire Straits tells the story of one of Britain's enduring rock bands.

programme.title: Creedence Clearwater Revival
programme.desc: Thanks largely to John Fogerty's rough, inimitable voice and seemingly bottomless supply of great melodies, Creedence Clearwater Revival were the preeminent American singles band of the late Sixties and early Seventies. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of Creedence Clearwater Revival.

programme.title: Pink Floyd
programme.desc: Pink Floyd are arguably the most influential progressive, psychedelic rock band of the 20th century. The first incarnation of Pink Floyd met at London's Regent Street Polytechnic School in the early 1960s, a time when rock and roll exploded in popularity throughout the UK. Art student Syd Barrett was introduced to the group and with his own songs he took over the front man role and gave them the name of Pink Floyd which was derived from the names of two blues musicians, Pink Anderson and Floyd Council. As well as Syd's art school background, the Beatles proved an inspiration to the early stages of the band. In 1967 the band signed a deal with EMI and released their debut, The Piper at the Gates of Dawn The promotional single, Arnold Layne, was surprisingly banned from some radio stations for its lyrical content Barrett's lyrics on The Piper At The Gates of Dawn covering fairytales and scarecrows pitted against the psychedelic instrumentation tapped into the British consciousness and moved on to the charts. Barrett struggled with the success of the band and whilst touring the US, it began to show. With Syd gone and Dave Gilmour on board the band ventured into new territory with experimental albums Ummagumma and Atom Heart Mother and Meddle. In 1973 Pink Floyd released The Dark Side of the Moon. It was to become their most critically and commercially successful album Featuring archive material, music videos “Comfortably Numb” “The Wall” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard) Rock Legends Pink Floyd tells the story of one of Britain's enduring rock bands

programme.title: The Doors
programme.desc: The Doors one of the most influential and controversial rock bands of the 1960s, were formed in Los Angeles in 1965 by UCLA film students Ray Manzarek, keyboards, and Jim Morrison, vocals with drummer John Densmore and guitarist Robby Krieger. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Doors.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: Regarded as the ultimate stadium rock band, Queen dominated the charts across the world in the 70s and 80s. This documentary looks to the influences cast on the early days of the band and their formidable front man Freddie Mercury, how they continually pushed the musical envelope with each album throughout their career and left a legacy of outstanding songs and videos that shaped popular culture. Highlights from the episode: - Contributions come from leading figures in the music industry: Andrew Harrison (Q Magazine Editor), Kate Mossman (The Spectator), Hamish MacBain (NME), Kim Taylor Bennett (Time Out), Camilla Pia (BBC Radio 6), John Aizlewood (The Independent) and Michael Bonner (Uncut) - The people that inspired the early days of the band, music from Jimi Hendrix, Led Zeppelin and Little Richard. - Archive interview footage from Freddie in the 80s and a look at his solo output. - The story behind their show stealing performance at Live Aid and their collaboration with David Bowie. - The sadness behind the video of ‘ These Are The Days of Our Lives'. - An arena made soundtrack including the likes of ‘ Seven Seas of Rhye', ‘Killer Queen', ‘Bohemian Rhapsody', ‘We Will Rock You', ‘We Are The Champions', ‘Under Pressure', ‘I Want To Break Free' and ‘Radio Ga Ga'

programme.title: The Police
programme.desc: The Police were an English new wave band formed in London in 1977.[1] For most of their history the band consisted of Sting (lead vocals, bass guitar, primary songwriter), Andy Summers (guitar) and Stewart Copeland (drums, percussion). The Police became globally popular in the late 1970s and early 1980s and are generally regarded as one of the first new-wave groups to achieve mainstream success, playing a style of rock influenced by punk, reggae, and jazz. They are also considered one of the leaders of the Second British Invasion of the U.S. They disbanded in 1986, but reunited in early 2007 for a one-off world tour that ended in August 2008. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Police.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: The Smiths
programme.desc: In the 1980s, The Smiths shattered the musical landscape with a startling sound unlike any other at the time. With the four albums they released, they inspired a whole new generation of musicians. formed The Smiths. A name specifically chosen for being ordinary. Signing to indie label, Rough Trade, the new group released their first single, 'Hand in Glove' in May 1983. The Smiths disbanded upon the release of their final album, 'Strangeways, Here We Come'. Featuring archive material, music videos – “HAND IN GLOVE” “THIS CHARMING MAN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6).

programme.title: Blur
programme.desc: Blur was formed in the late 1980s when all four members were attending London's Goldsmith's College. However lead signer Damon Albarn and guitarist Graham Coxon had actually known each other since childhood, growing up together in Colchester. With bassist Alex James and drummer Dave Rowntree, the band began playing under the name of Seymour, after a character created by J D Salinger, but they soon changed that to Blur to secure a deal with Food Records. After their debut She's So High failed to trouble the top of the charts, Blur teamed up with producer Stephen Street. They had immediate success with the single There's No Other Way. Upon its release, Blur's debut album, Leisure, failed to make the impact Food Records had hoped for but the band had a musical turning point with the release of the single Popscene. It had a distinctly English sound and is often credited as being the very first Britpop song. Blur decided to take on a quintessentially English style and image for their second album, Modern Life is Rubbish. By hanging on to their newfound English heritage, commercial fortunes would change for Blur in 1994 with the release of the single Girls and Boys. The success of Girls and Boys propelled the band's third album, Parklife, to enter the charts at number one.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Nine Inch Nails
programme.desc: Nine Inch Nails have surpassed many of their contemporaries by continually pushing the boundaries of what a rock act should do. For a band that has consistently battled the corporate side of the music industry they have still managed to sell over 20 million albums worldwide. Although presented as a live unit, the music of Nine Inch Nails is the sole output of Producer and singer, Trent Reznor. As a young multi instrumentalist,Reznor took up a job at Right Track Studio where he began to produce his first album 1989's 'Pretty Hate Machine'. 'Head like a Hole' was the second release from the debut. It enjoyed heavy rotation on radio, and would become the breakthrough song for the band. 'Broken' was a turning point for the sound of Nine Inch Nails. It was also the point when Reznor founded Nothing Records to step away from his deal with label TVT. Nine Inch Nails had entered the mainstream with the success of the album, 'The Downward Spiral'. But it would be five years before singer Trent Reznor would release his next record, 'The Fragile' in 1999. In a deal with Columbia Records Nine Inch Nails released the 2013 single, 'Came Back Haunted'. The video was directed by David Lynch. Featuring archive material, music videos – “HURT” “CLOSER” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Guns N' Roses
programme.desc: Guns N' Roses shocked and awed upon their arrival on the 80s rock scene. Their notoriety and musicianship bred sales of 150 million records, making them one of the world's biggest rock bands of all time. With his friend, Izzy Stradlin, Axl entered the Los Angeles music scene as the lead singer of rock band Hollywood Rose and from playing the Hollywood circuit, Guns N' Roses would soon emerge Signed to Geffen Records for a $75,000 advance, the band entered the studio to work on their debut, Appetite For Destruction Bassist Duff McKagan brought a riff to the recording studio and within three hours the band completed Welcome to the Jungle. The song would bring the group to the world's attention. After Welcome to the Jungle became an unexpected MTV hit, follow-up single Sweet Child of Mine was placed on heavy rotation on US radio play-lists. It went on to top the Billboard chart Featuring archive material, music videos – “PARADISE CITY” “WELCOME TO THE JUNGLE” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig, Andris Nelsons & Kristine Opolais
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons, together with his then-wife, the great soprano Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonin Dvořák, singing the melodies that the composer hid in all layers of his music with tender, warm, soft colors. Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing the omnipresent beauty of Dvořák's music to unfold and flood the Gewandhaus. The program opens with Othello, a Concert Overture for Orchestra, Op. 93. Opolais performs “Song to the Moon” from Rusalka, “Songs my Mother Taught Me” from Gypsy Songs, Op. 55/4. This is followed by the Polonaise and 'O, marno, marno to je' from Rusalka and 'Dobrá! Já mu je dám!... Jak je mi?' from Smetana's opera Dalibor. The concert closes with a performance of Dvořák's Symphony no. 9 in E Minor, Op. 95 (“From the New World”). Recorded at the Gewandhaus, Leipzig in May 2017.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Russian conductor and pianist Mikhail Pletnev leads the Russian National Orchestra in performances of Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov's music. On the program are Suite for Orchestra after the opera 'The Legend of the Invisible City of Kitezh and the Maiden Fevroniya', and Musical Pictures for Orchestra from the opera 'The Tale of Tsar Saltan'. Part of the latter is the famous 'Flight of the Bumblebee'. This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall of the Russian Philharmonic Society in 2017.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Brahms - Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms's Symphony No. 4 in E minor, Op. 98. Brahms completed his last symphony in 1885. He conducted the successful premiere of the piece in the German city of Meiningen in October of the same year. The symphony's finale movement is a chaconne, a variation form that reflects the composer's fascination with Baroque music. In this movement, Brahms borrowed an 8-measure theme from J. S. Bach's cantata ‘Nach dir, Herr, verlanget mich', BWV 150. The movement opens with the theme and then presents a set of variations all set over the same repeated theme in the bass. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Señora Acero: Sara contra Juan
programme.desc: Sara enfrenta a Juan porque quiere proteger a Miriam. Elio descubre quién está en el complot con Cortés y se enfrenta a un dilema ético. Lupita corre peligro en el quirófano improvisado de Enriqueta.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Frida fue hallada con vida y trasladada al hospital por el propio Martín Cabrera, quien hace el anuncio a través de la prensa. Salvador teme que ella despierte y lo cuente todo.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: La carta de Frida no solo habla del amor que existe entre Abelardo y su hija, ahora es una pieza clave de la investigación. Cabrera se la entrega en persona a Pons y le parte el corazón.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Victoria se horroriza cuando descubre que Danilo Ferro es en realidad Aurelio Casillas. Chacorta alerta a su hermano de abandonar el funeral de Ximena, porque los de la Marina vienen por ellos.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Rutila llama a su padre, le dice que se acostó con su peor enemigo y le da pistas de dónde está. Ahora los Casillas quieren acabar con el Chema, pero solo logran atraer a la DEA.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Victoria le tiende una trampa a Aurelio, pero es ella quien paga las consecuencias por traicionarlo. Leonor se enfrenta al Señor de los Cielos, y luego de tantos años, al fin logra capturarlo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La luna de miel entre Verónica y Alejandro se prolonga intensamente, pero queda interrumpida cuando Irene se presenta en la mina y los amenaza con un arma. Lucho manipula fácilmente a Irene.

programme.title: Corazón valiente: Veneno
programme.desc: Fernanda prepara una poción letal para Violeta. Samantha y Ángela logran rescatar a Willy de las llamas y él se entera de que Sam es su guardaespaldas. Samantha sufre, no podrá ser madre.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Para darle celos a Manuel, Stella planea que Poncho le proponga matrimonio en la terminal pesquera. Ese día ella grita que sí y entre vítores le pide a Manuel que sea el padrino.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: La Policía interroga a Chivis sobre su esposo y ella lo encubre. Antonio la vigila a escondidas. María José pierde el semestre en la universidad y tiene que trabajar en la terminal pesquera.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Antonio José le explica a Chivis lo que sucede. Llena de dolor y rabia, ella acepta ayudarlo, pero le pone una condición que él no quiere cumplir. Stella y Poncho se casan en pocos días.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a su esposo, Chivis va en busca de Manuel y observa que se besa con Stella, Poncho le reclama a su jefe por ese beso. La Policía busca de nuevo a Chivis para interrogarla.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Las Santillana están por perder la casa, las deudas se acumulan y el banco les niega más préstamos. Francisca teme por las finanzas de su hermano Ariel, y le pide firmar un acuerdo prenupcial.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Guillermo, el padre de Nicolás, interrumpe la boda para prevenir a Ariel de las intenciones de Flavia luego echa a su hijo de la empresa al descubrir que dio un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Ariel y su sobrino Bruno descubren que Nicolás le pagó a Flavia un millón de dólares para poder casarse. Penélope le pregunta a Bianca si está segura de que su madre no la vendió también.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Una escuela privada elitista, donde la mayoría de los estudiantes son de la alta sociedad, asegura un exitoso futuro para los jóvenes becados de bajos recursos. Sin embargo, luchar con las barreras sociales será la clave para su éxito.

programme.title: La fea más bella
programme.desc: Lety es una chica muy inteligente pero poco agraciada, más bien fea, que se graduó con honores en economía, habla varios idiomas y es una genia en las finanzas, pero por su físico no encuentra trabajo. Desesperada por encontrar empleo, acepta que la contraten por debajo de su capacidad y se emplea como secretaria en una famosa productora de videos llamada Conceptos en donde la fealdad es un tabú.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: La serie ligera y divertida de situaciones cómicas producida por la cadena mexicana Televisa, relata las vidas de los habitantes de un edificio de apartamentos y sus relaciones entre ellos, se exploran los conflictos y sucesos divertidos que pueden pasar entre vecinos al tener que vivir cercanamente con gente que tiene personalidades diferentes. Durante cada episodio de 60 minutos se tocan temas en la trama del programa como la envidia, la ambición, el egoísmo, la solidaridad y en general desarrolla temas que pasan a diario en la vida de un ser común. Su creador Eugenio Derbez, también participa como actor y comediante en la serie, junto a él también participan César Bono como Frankie Rivers, Eduardo España como Germán Martínez, Macaria como Magdalena Pérez y Polo Ortín como Don Roque Balboa, entre otros.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: La serie ligera y divertida de situaciones cómicas producida por la cadena mexicana Televisa, relata las vidas de los habitantes de un edificio de apartamentos y sus relaciones entre ellos, se exploran los conflictos y sucesos divertidos que pueden pasar entre vecinos al tener que vivir cercanamente con gente que tiene personalidades diferentes. Durante cada episodio de 60 minutos se tocan temas en la trama del programa como la envidia, la ambición, el egoísmo, la solidaridad y en general desarrolla temas que pasan a diario en la vida de un ser común. Su creador Eugenio Derbez, también participa como actor y comediante en la serie, junto a él también participan César Bono como Frankie Rivers, Eduardo España como Germán Martínez, Macaria como Magdalena Pérez y Polo Ortín como Don Roque Balboa, entre otros.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: La serie de situaciones cómicas mexicana, se centra en una familia conformada por Ludovico, protagonizado por Eugenio Derbez, quien es la cabeza de la familia, su esposa, Federica (Consuelo Duval), y sus tres hijos, Junior (Luis Manuel Ávila), Bibi (Regina Blandón) y Ludoviquito (Miguel Pérez). Ellos viven en una ciudad muy particular, la cual está edificada con peluche y todos los accesorios son de peluche también. Ellos son una familia común y corriente que enfrentan problemas comunes, los cuales son representados en el programa de manera exagerada, los conflictos siempre terminan en situaciones divertidas. La comedia de humor original, ligera y única está dirigida para todo el público en general.

programme.desc: Graciela le revela a Fabiola que sabe la verdad sobre su pasado y le pide que le dé la parte de su herencia. José Luis le dice a Esmeralda que está dispuesto a recuperar el amor de Montserrat.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Refugio cae en llanto al saber que Armando se ha muerto. Oriana le advierte a Fernando sobre Teresa y el interés que tiene en su fortuna.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Mariano realiza una cena muy romántica para pedirle a Aurora que se case con él. Luisa le pide a Fernando una nueva oportunidad para ser una pareja.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Lección de amor

programme.desc: Clarita cree que Gaviota pueda estar embarazada, mientras que Rodrigo se encierra en la hacienda para alejarse de todos. Videgaray y Bruno dudan de las acusaciones de Aarón hacia Gaviota. Daniela le dice a Rodrigo cómo fue que descubrieron a Gaviota.

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia le confiesa a Rodolfo la verdad sobre su pasado. María Mercedes sufre al saber que una de sus hijas murió. Malvina teme que Jorge Luis ya no esté interesado en Mística.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia le pide a María Mercedes otra oportunidad para enmendar su error. María Mercedes y Jorge Luis logran el sueño de casarse por la iglesia. Malvina queda loca.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica hace una fiesta en la hacienda para poner en ridículo a Marimar y avergonzar a Sergio frente a sus amigos.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio regaña a Marimar por la agresión que le hizo a su amiga, además de confesar que no la quiere Marimar huye y le cuenta todo a Corazón.

programme.desc: Tita comienza a sospechar que María tiene un amante por lo que la investiga y la sigue. María le confiesa a Agripina que ella es la madre de Nandito.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Ana Paula le confiesa Rogelio que desea casarse con él y poder tener una vida feliz a su lado. Rogelio piensa que pronto podría caminar y así poder jugar con Margarito al fútbol. Gustavo descubre que Cynthia está esperando un hijo de él.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Maximiliano le jura a Violeta que está enamorado de ella y le pide una oportunidad para estar juntos. Pablo acepta acompañar a Mariano a su viaje, Fausta lo descubre y trata de convencer a Renato de ir también.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Cristina se molesta al enterarse que Renato se fue de viaje con su familia sin avisarle. Rogelio comienza a sospechar que Cristina lo engaña.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariano va a buscar a Antonia a su casa, pero descubre que ya no vive donde él pensaba. Leonora sospecha que Mariano esconde algo en el pueblo.

programme.title: Juro que te amo

programme.title: La que no podía amar

programme.desc: Esmeralda se encuentra a Inés quien la enfrenta para recordarle de donde viene. Lorenza solamente quiere a Pablito y a los demás nietos que tiene los maltrata y los hace menos. Gisela, Lorenza y Mónica se unen para acabar con Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Despedidas
programme.desc: Cynthia le pide a Gustavo que se case con ella por la iglesia. Miguel decide irse de la hacienda para dejar que Ana Paula haga su vida con Rogelio. Rogelio se prepara para su operación. Cynthia cree que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Accidente planeado

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Fiesta en La Sierra

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor organizan una fiesta por el cumpleaños de Rosita, pero como es su costumbre, lo complican todo y un inesperado suceso acaba con la celebración.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano creen que se merecen unas vacaciones, por lo que convencen a Doña Cuca y a Rosita de organizar El PaqueteMojes, un viaje todo incluido a un balneario, en el que aprovecharán para mostrar sus encantos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show goes whole hog! Up first, pastrami bacon made by brine-curing pork belly, rubbing it with a pastrami rub, and finally slow-smoking it over hardwood. Then an apple cider-based brine and rum-spiked finishing glaze pork chops. Next, "pork and beans" like you've never seen them. Finally, rings of sweet onions are doused with hot sauce, spiraled with bacon, and crisped over the fire. (S3 E08)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates the holy BBQ trinity of barbecue: pork ribs, brisket, and pulled pork. America's favorite ribs—baby backs—are glazed with an unexpected ingredient. Beef brisket and baked beans star in crispy grilled tostadas. An amazing BBQ Titans' brisket with espresso in the barbecue sauce. Finally, pulled pork marinated in an umami-rich Korean chili paste called gochujang. (S3 E09)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Its bright but complex flavors and affinity for smoke and fire have fueled the obsession with Mexican food and drink north of the border. Tomatoes, onions, and chiles are roasted in the coals to make an unforgettable salsa. Quesadillas conceal a perfectly cooked egg. Then, a Grilled Nopalitos Corn Salad and chipotle-marinated pork tenderloin. To finish, pineapple slices flambéed with mezcal. (S3 E10)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show highlights the conviviality of a South American cookout. The secrets to recreate the pollo served in Peruvian enclaves will be revealed in this episode. Little known in the U.S. is choripan, a kind of Andean hot dog. Finally, Brazilian churrasco is made of spit-roast picanha (top sirloin cap), chicken thighs, kielbasa, peppers, and onions—all served with a Brazilian country-style salsa. (S3 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Victory will be yours! Start the party with chicken legs smoke-roasted over maple wood, then glazed with a fiery fusion of maple syrup and sriracha. A quartet of grilled and smoked beans appears in a colorful side dish. Next up, a trio of internationally-inspired burgers: inside-out American-style burgers Greek-style spiced lamb burgers and kaffir lime-scented Thai veal burgers. (S3 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Steven takes a field trip to the famed Hitching Post II in Buellton, California, where owner Frank Ostini demonstrates the ultimate Santa Maria barbecue. Back on the set, Santa Barbara fisherwoman Stephanie Munz shares her secret for grilled whelks (sea snails). The celebration continues as we meet some of the production crew and go behind the scenes of Project Smoke. (S3 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, learn to use an electric smoker, offset smoker, and upright barrel smoker to make delicious smoked treats. On the menu: cold smoked scallops with smoked tomatoes and jicama mango salsa smoke-roasted chicken with horseradish dip and pecan-smoked baby back ribs with prickly pear barbecue sauce. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this episode, learn how to make luscious barbecued Berkshire pork belly house-cured pastrami and Kentucky-style barbecued lamb shoulder with an unusual black barbecue sauce called "dip". Plus, check out a new take on a classic cocktail–a smoked Manhattan! (S1 E02)

programme.title: Kent Rollins: Cowboy Cooking
programme.desc: In this episode, Kent Rollins makes the cowboy version of chicken pot pie using smoked chicken and homemade pie crust. Next, is a tender and juicy pot roast that's perfect for a cold winter night. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Kent Rollins: Cowboy Cooking

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league championship softball team. And finally, Froy and Sonia stumble into a bizarre love triangle when it turns out their car is owned by the sugar-daddy of a cheating spouse.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.sub-title: Taylor Schilling, Design Under $30 with Maryline Damour, Wildflower
programme.desc: “Pam & Tommy” star Taylor Schilling stops by to chat. Plus, Design Week continues with Contributing Editor of “House Beautiful” Maryline Damour who shares budget-friendly secrets to spruce up any room. Then, Drew helps celebrate International Woman's Day with an all-new Wildflower featuring Retired U.S. Army Soldier Donna Pratt.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: 50 Cent Show Takeover, Ziwe, Drew's News with "SNL" Star Melissa Villasenor
programme.desc: Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson is filling in for Drew as co-host for the day! Comedian Ziwe Fumudoh stops by to chat about the new season of her late-night talk show "Ziwe." Plus, "SNL" star Melissa Villasenor is joining 50 Cent and Ross Mathews at the news desk to serve the headline sunny-side up including the new trend in dating apps, blind dating.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Pasta Week Kick-Off, Joseph Gordon Levitt, Morena Baccarin
programme.desc: “Super Pumped” star Joseph Gordon Levitt stops by to chat. Plus, “The Endgame” star Morena Baccarin. Then, Drew kicks off Pasta Week, a week-long celebration of one of the best foods on earth, with Iron Chef winner and co-host of “Fast Foodies” Justin Sutherland whipping up Mac and Cheese.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drew's Crew To The Rescue Hour
programme.desc: Drew's Crew to the Rescue Hour: Drew's assembled her Drew's Crew team of experts to help solve viewers' dilemmas on everything from fashion to food to relationships and remodeling. Celebrity Interior Designer Mikel Welch is surprising one deserving viewer who lost her home office in Hurricane Ida with a brand-new workspace. Then, hair stylist extraordinaire Chris Appleton helps one mother of three spruce up her look before heading back to the office. Plus, renowned dating coach Damona Hoffman is on-site to help one couple reignite their marriage after recently becoming empty nesters, and “Rebel Homemaker” co-author Pilar Valdes is whipping up a yummy and healthy dish to help curb those carb cravings.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Cooking with Carla Hall, Annaleigh Ashford, Drew's News
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall is joining Drew and whipping up some delicious dishes and shares what inspired her to write her new children's book, “Carla and the Christmas Cornbread.” Plus, “B Positive” star Annaleigh Ashford stops by to chat. Then, it's an all new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up. Pop Quiz Week continues, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Eco-Heroines
programme.sub-title: Anna and the Thresher Sharks (The Philippines)
programme.desc: On the island of Malapascua in the Philippines, Anna Oposa and her team are working with local fisherman to create a nature reserve where thresher sharks can thrive. These sharks are famous for their long tails which they use to whip and stun their prey. Every day, pelagic thresher sharks head to Monad Shoal, a sunken island just off the coast of Malapascua, where other fish “clean” them of their external parasites. This remarkable sight is popular with divers but the numbers of thresher sharks are dwindling and Anna is spearheading the campaign to protect this incredible species in the Philippines.

Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!
